title: Marcus D. Wiley Comedy Show
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Marcus D. Wiley brings his hilarious stand-up to Atlanta for a perfect date night out. Known for his clean yet side-splitting humor, Marcus has been making audiences laugh for over 20 years. Great energy, relatable stories, and an unforgettable night.

title: Standups & Startups – ATL June Edition
location: Siemens Energy Innovation Center, 500 10th St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: Atlanta's startup community's favorite comedy night is back! Enjoy hilarious stand-up while networking with Atlanta's innovation scene. Full bar available, casual vibe — perfect for a fun and different date night that keeps the conversation flowing.

title: Afro Beat & Caribbean Vibes Night
location: Tago Life Center, 892 Jefferson St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: Dance the night away with infectious Afrobeat and Caribbean rhythms! Tropical Vibes Night brings the best island energy to Midtown Atlanta. Great vibes, positive people, and non-stop dancing — ideal for couples who love to move together.

title: Jess Hilarious Live Comedy
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Comedian and The Breakfast Club co-host Jess Hilarious hits the stage for an unforgettable night of laughs! The Couple's Package includes premium seats and a $45 food/beverage credit per person. Perfect for a memorable date night.

title: Lines of Play – Soccer-Inspired Group Art Exhibition
location: ABV Gallery, 1206 Metropolitan Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
description: 30+ local and international artists explore soccer's energy, movement, and cultural impact in a stunning historic church venue in East Atlanta Village. A sophisticated yet fun free date idea — walk through, grab a drink, and discover amazing art together.

title: Smooth Jazz Nights with Milkshake Mayfield
location: Louisiana Bistreaux Buckhead, 3312 Piedmont Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30305
description: World-renowned trumpeter Milkshake Mayfield and The Milkshake Quintet bring smooth jazz to Buckhead every Tuesday. Sultry, soulful, and sophisticated — this is date night done right. Reserve a table for a cozy evening of live music and elevated dining.

title: Steph Tolev Live Comedy
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Award-winning comedian Steph Tolev brings her unique energy to Atlanta for a must-see show. Known from The D-List and Netflix specials. Another great comedy date night option at one of the city's best comedy venues.

title: KOKOROKO Live at Buckhead Theatre
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd NE, Atlanta, GA 30305
description: London's Afrobeat sensation KOKOROKO brings their global sound to Atlanta! Gritty, soulful, and powerful — their music blends West African highlife, jazz, and funk. A phenomenal live music date night experience for couples who appreciate real musicianship.

title: Hawt Sauce! Queer Dance Party
location: Aisle 5, 1123 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Atlanta's legendary queer dance party returns! High-energy dance floor, incredible DJs, and one of the most inclusive and fun party scenes in the city. A great couples' night out if you want something bold, vibrant, and outside the box.
